title: Sahil Zaman
content:
Partner | President, MT❯Forge
People.ContactEmail szaman@mccarthy.ca
- University of Western Ontario
Sahil’s experience bridges law, entrepreneurship, and innovation. He brings to the firm a combination of legal acumen, business leadership, and a deep belief in the power of technology to enhance legal practice.
Sahil Zaman is a Partner at McCarthy Tétrault and the leader of MT❯Forge, a division of the firm focused on delivering high-volume transactional legal work. By combining advanced AI tools, scalable legal talent, and the firm's expertise, his team provides efficient, consistent, and cost-predictable legal services.
Before joining the firm, Sahil was the co-founder and CEO of Closing Folders, a legal technology company that developed one of the first comprehensive legal transaction management (LTM) platforms. Under his leadership, Closing Folders became the leading LTM provider to law firms across North America before being acquired by iManage, a global software company.
At iManage, Sahil continued to lead the LTM business, driving significant growth and international expansion. He also advised a rapidly-scaling European legal AI company on its North American entry strategy. In each of these roles, Sahil honed his skills in marrying simple processes with complex technology to deliver exceptional outcomes for lawyers and their clients. His experience in automating closings has sharpened his ability to identify bottlenecks, reimagine workflows, and propose smarter legal operations. With a bias toward usable solutions, he strives to deliver outcomes that matter: reduced cost, accelerated timelines, and more predictable risk management.
Sahil earned a B.Comm. from the University of Calgary and a J.D. from Western University. He is called to the bar in Ontario.
- South Asian Bar Association – 2020 Legal Excellence Award

### South Asian Bar Association – 2020
Legal Excellence Award
- McCarthy Tétrault Launches MT❯Forge to reimagine Legal Service Delivery January 14, 2026
